items.title: Boeing Cargo Plane Veers Off Runway At Hong Kong Airport, Claims Two Lives
items.description: On Sunday, a cargo plane from Boeing Co. (NYSE: BA) operated by Emirates veered off the runway at Hong Kong International Airport, resulting in two fatalities.

items.title: Boeing (BA): Examining Valuation as Shares Rebound 24% Year-to-Date
items.description: Boeing (BA) shares saw subtle movement in recent trading sessions, still higher for the year. Investors are watching closely for new developments after a series of earlier gains and losses influenced by broader market dynamics. See our latest analysis for Boeing. Boeing’s share price has steadily rebounded this year, up almost 24% year-to-date, even after some recent dips in the past quarter. items.title: Consumer Tech News (Oct 13-17): Elon Musk's Starlink Under US Probe, Salesforce Eyes $60B Revenue, Apple Launches M5 Chip And More
items.description: U.S. Congress probes Elon Musk's Starlink over Myanmar links as Apple unveils M5 chip, TSMC beats earnings, and Salesforce targets $60B revenue by FY2030.

items.title: Boeing Gets FAA Green Light To Boost 737 Max Output After Alaska Airlines Door Plug Blowout
items.description: The FAA has approved Boeing to raise 737 Max production to 42 jets per month following Alaska Airlines door plug incident.
